name: ViewpointDistanceType
summary: Describes the user's intentions if the product has to modify near and far distances (typically because of graphics system limitations).

enum_values.name: Constrained
enum_values.summary: For near distance, user has specified maximum distance and the product can use a smaller value to increase render quality. For far distance, user has specified minimum distance and the product can use a larger value to increase render quality.

enum_values.name: Auto
enum_values.summary: Distance was chosen automatically by the product.
